Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends by 3.46%.the main contract closed 795.5. some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills tended tobe wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
